factors.rationale: The product is visible but competes with the packaging and background.
The product is shown without a clear use case or context.
No specific buyer benefit is communicated in the image.
The layout has competing elements and lacks clear spacing.
The product is clear, but material quality is not emphasized.
The brand is visible and recognizable, providing a trust signal.
The image is mostly readable, but some elements lack clarity.
The image primarily reads as a product display without campaign context.
